description: Agent skills, reusable prompt workflows, capability packs, and installable AI assistant extensions.

items.name: Guizang PPT Skill
items.summary: A Claude Code / Codex compatible agent skill for generating single-file HTML presentation decks, PPT visuals, and social cover images in editorial magazine or Swiss design styles.
use_cases: Generate horizontal swipe HTML slide decks from articles, Markdown, outlines, or product analysis notes.
Create presentation visuals, screenshots, and social cover images with consistent visual systems.
Use stricter Swiss-style layout validation for data, product, method, and technical presentations.

links.note: Usage, installation, supported platforms, and examples.
Main skill workflow and operating instructions.

risk_notes: Not installed or executed locally as of 2026-06-14.
Repository license is AGPL-3.0; review implications before adapting or redistributing generated/templates code.
Installation requires running npx or cloning a third-party repository into an agent skills directory.
The workflow expects an agent with local filesystem and shell access, so review source before granting broad permissions.
Generated HTML decks may use browser runtime features, local assets, WebGL/canvas, and possible CDN fallbacks; inspect output before sharing externally.
Presentation source materials, screenshots, and generated images may contain sensitive business or personal information.

source_review.github_description: AI-agent Skill for generating polished HTML slide decks: editorial magazine and Swiss layouts, image prompts, social covers, and a WebGL/low-power presentation runtime.

items.name: Huashu Design
items.summary: An agent-agnostic HTML-native design skill for producing high-fidelity prototypes, HTML slide decks, motion demos, infographics, design variations, expert reviews, and exportable MP4/GIF/PPTX/PDF artifacts.
use_cases: Create high-fidelity HTML app or web prototypes with clickable flows and browser verification.
Generate HTML-native presentation decks and optionally export them to editable PPTX or PDF.
Produce timeline-driven motion design demos and export MP4/GIF outputs with optional audio.
Explore multiple visual directions, apply brand asset protocols, and run structured design reviews.

links.note: Chinese README with positioning, installation, demos, and license notes.
Main agent workflow and operating instructions.

risk_notes: Not installed or executed locally as of 2026-06-14.
Installation requires running npx or cloning a third-party repository into an agent skills environment.
The skill expects local filesystem, shell, browser, Playwright, export scripts, and optional media-processing workflows.
Generated prototypes, decks, videos, and screenshots may embed private brand assets, product screenshots, customer data, or local file paths.
Some workflows involve downloading brand assets, public images, audio, or external references; source and licensing should be checked per project.
Optional voiceover or API-driven workflows may require secrets in environment variables; never commit generated .env files.
Repository is large and asset-heavy; evaluate install size and dependency surface before making it active.

source_review.github_description: Huashu Design · HTML-native design skill for Claude Code · Claude Code 里 HTML 原生的设计 skill · 高保真原型 / 幻灯片 / 动画 + 20 设计哲学 + 5 维评审 + MP4 导出 · Agent-agnostic
